channel.title: Ghar Ka Organic
channel.description: Authentic Himalayan organic products — bilona desi ghee, pahadi honey, Kumaoni pickles and more.

item.g:title: Bilona Desi Ghee from Uttarakhand – A2 Cow Milk Ghee
item.g:description: Traditional Bilona Desi Ghee made using the ancient hand-churning method from A2 cow milk in Uttarakhand. Pure, chemical-free, rich in natural nutrients, and full of authentic aroma. No preservatives, no additives — just 100% natural desi ghee sourced from free-grazing pahadi cows.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Dairy Products
item.g:product_type: Dairy & Ghee > Desi Ghee > Bilona Ghee

item.g:title: Raw Pahadi Honey from Uttarakhand – Pure Forest Honey
item.g:description: Natural Himalayan Pahadi Honey collected from wild forest bees in Uttarakhand mountains. 100% raw, unfiltered, unprocessed and free from any additives or refined sugar. Rich in antioxidants, enzymes and natural minerals. Not heated or filtered — retains all natural goodness.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Honey
item.g:product_type: Honey & Natural Sweeteners > Raw Honey > Pahadi Honey

item.g:title: Kumaoni Aam Achar – Traditional Mango Pickle
item.g:description: Traditional Kumaoni mango pickle prepared with pahadi raw mangoes, Himalayan spices and homemade mountain mustard oil. Authentic taste of Uttarakhand. Handcrafted in small batches using traditional recipes from the Kumaon hills. Free from artificial preservatives and colours.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces > Pickles & Relishes
item.g:product_type: Pickles & Achars > Mango Pickle > Kumaoni Achar

item.g:title: Nimbu Achar – Lemon Pickle
item.g:description: Traditional Kumaoni lemon pickle with fresh pahadi lemons, Himalayan spices, and pure mustard oil. Tangy, spicy, and aromatic with authentic mountain flavor. Handcrafted in small batches using traditional recipes from the Kumaon hills. Free from artificial preservatives and colours.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces > Pickles & Relishes
item.g:product_type: Pickles & Achars > Lemon Pickle > Kumaoni Achar

item.g:title: Bhang Chutney – Traditional Kumaoni Recipe
item.g:description: Authentic Kumaoni Bhang Chutney made with hemp seeds and Himalayan spices. A unique traditional recipe from Uttarakhand with authentic mountain flavors. Handcrafted using traditional methods. Free from artificial preservatives and colours.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces
